properties.action_apr23: ordered Navy 'shoot and kill' mine-laying boats; 'total control' of Hormuz, 'Sealed up Tight'; 'Don't rush me' on timeline; announced Israel-Lebanon ceasefire 3-week extension; said no nukes in Iran war; Americans should expect higher gas prices 'for a little while'; tripled mine-sweeping operations

denies Ghalibaf resignation; says opening Hormuz 'impossible' while blockade persists; IRGC releases seizure video; Pezeshkian seeks 'dialogue and agreement' but blames blockade; Araghchi: 'aggressors responsible'

releases dramatic video of MSC-Francesca and Epaminondas seizures; 33 fast-attack boats detected by satellite near Kargan coast ('mosquito fleet'); intervention caused Ghalibaf to resign from negotiating team (reported/denied)

properties.status_apr23: Trump claims 'total control', 'sealed up tight'; orders shoot-to-kill on mine-laying boats; tripled mine-sweeping; IRGC 33-boat 'mosquito fleet' near Kargan; 7th consecutive day of major oil price swings; Brent $105.07

properties.action_apr23: Israeli Channel 12 reports Ghalibaf resigned from negotiating team due to IRGC interference; Iran denies; oil prices spiked $107 on report; peace deal market drops to 9% YES
agrees to 3-week ceasefire extension with Lebanon at White House; Leiter represents at 2nd round talks; Netanyahu and Aoun invited to White House 'in near future'

properties.status_apr23: ceasefire extended 3 weeks to mid-May; 2nd Washington talks held; asks for end to Israeli demolitions, IDF withdrawal, prisoner release; journalist killed by Israel (AJ liveblog)

properties.action_apr23: says Tehran wants 'dialogue and agreement' but 'breach of commitments, blockade and threats' are main obstacles to 'genuine negotiations'
says 'aggressors' responsible for war consequences; meets South Korean envoy; did NOT resign despite Ghalibaf report
meets Iranian ambassador Moghadam; reaffirms Pakistan mediation commitment
leads 2nd round Israel-Lebanon Washington talks; ambassador-level negotiations at WH

properties.detail: Trump orders US Navy to 'shoot and kill' any boat laying mines in Hormuz. 'No hesitation.' Tripled mine-sweeping operations. Claims US has 'total control' of strait, 'Sealed up Tight.' Said Iran's navy 'all 159 ships at the bottom of the sea.'

Trump announces 3-week ceasefire extension after 2nd round White House talks. Was set to expire Apr 26. Now extends to mid-May. Rubio leads US delegation with Huckabee, Needham, Issa. Netanyahu and Aoun invited to WH 'in near future.' Lebanon asks end to IDF demolitions, troop withdrawal, prisoner release.

Israeli Channel 12 reports Ghalibaf resigned from Iran's US negotiating team due to IRGC interference. Iran denies. Oil prices spiked (Brent to $107) on the report. Prediction market for Apr 30 peace deal drops to 9% YES. Deepens IRGC-pragmatist split narrative.
properties.status: unconfirmed — Channel 12 report vs Iranian denial

properties.detail: Iran releases dramatic video of masked IRGC fighters boarding MSC-Francesca via gunboat, climbing hull with rifles. Also shows Epaminondas seizure. Philippine government confirms 15 seafarers safe. Video used as propaganda/deterrent.

Sentinel-2 satellite captures 33 IRGC fast-attack boats near Kargan coast in Hormuz. 'Mosquito fleet' show-of-force deployment. Copernicus/Sentinel-2 imagery analyzed by OSINT investigators. Contradicts Trump claim of Iranian navy destroyed.

properties.cause: Trump shoot-to-kill order + Ghalibaf resignation report + continued Hormuz disruption

properties.detail: Pullback from record highs. IBM -8%, ServiceNow -18%. Tech leads decline. Oil surge and Iran uncertainty weigh.
Thousands more US forces heading to ME. Bush carrier group 6,000 + Boxer ARG 4,000+. Total ~60,000 in region. Largest buildup since 2003 Iraq invasion. Continued despite ceasefire.

properties.significance: IRGC fast-attack boat staging area near Hormuz

properties.action_apr23: met PM Sharif to discuss peace efforts and ceasefire extension
